src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace Lombok's type-inference 'val' with Java 10+ 'var' to remove dependency on Lombok for local variable type inference.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.why_exists: Lombok's 'val' is not part of the Java language specification; while it compiles on JDK 11 with Lombok, the migration intent is to use standard Java features ('var') to decouple from Lombok's specific syntax or prepare for Lombok removal.
